raw_consumer_statement:
( 1 ) A fraudulent charge for {$900.00} appeared on our Citibank XXXX statement on XX/XX/year>. 
( 2 ) The merchant was listed as " XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX NY, '' not an entity we are familiar with. A " transportation service. '' ( 3 ) We thought the charge might be for a six-minute {$50.00} XXXX  ride we took in XXXX XXXX ( the driver said he was charging our card for {$50.00} and did not give a receipt ). But I am not sure that the {$900.00} charge relates to that event, and we have not been able to verify that, including because Citibank had not ben responsive with any information about the merchant or the charge.

( 4 ) Citibank initially issued a {$850.00} credit for the disputed charge, and then reversed it.

( 5 ) Citibank has not provided contact information for the merchant despite repeated requests.

( 6 ) Citibank has not provided any explanation for the {$900.00} charge, despite repeated requests.

( 7 ) Citibank claims that XXXX will not provide information about the merchant or the charge either. 
( 8 ) I do not know how many other consumers have been taken advantage of by false or inflated charges by " XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX NY. '' ( 9 ) Citibank and XXXX should not be shielding this merchant - whatever sort of business it is- and facilitating its fraudulent charges. 
( 10 ) I am hoping you can help us and any other consumers that may be affected by this fraud.
